message:
test(daemon): add isRunningFromPID tests from PR #2242

Tests cover stale PID cleanup, missing PID file, and live process
detection. The code fix for GH#2107 landed in d3649ac3 (PR #2216);
these tests from DreadPirateRobertz provide additional coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Chris Deal <cdeal@mines.edu>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
